source: All .gpl files fetched from https://lospec.com (CC BY-SA 4.0 unless palette page states otherwise). Each entry preserves the original creator credit; please respect their license when shipping derivatives.

entries.name: PICO-8
entries.creator: Lexaloffle Games
entries.description: Default 16-color PICO-8 fantasy console palette. Saturated, friendly, very recognizable. Great teaching palette for beginners.

entries.name: Sweetie 16
entries.creator: GrafxKid
entries.description: GrafxKid's lush 16-color palette balancing skin tones, foliage, water, and UI without feeling crowded.

entries.name: Endesga 16
entries.creator: ENDESGA
entries.description: Pared-down 16-color version of the EDG family. Strong warm bias, punchy chunky shading.

entries.name: Endesga 32 (EDG32)
entries.creator: ENDESGA
entries.description: Workhorse 32-color palette by ENDESGA. Used by Pixel Dailies, Spelunky-likes, and countless indie games. Strong skin/foliage/stone ramps.

entries.name: Endesga 64 (EDG64)
entries.creator: ENDESGA
entries.description: Honed over years, refined and balanced; full ramps for skin, metal, fabric, foliage. The de-facto modern indie palette.

entries.name: Apollo
entries.creator: AdamCYounis
entries.description: AdamCYounis's painterly 46-color palette. Strong analogous ramps for moody scenes, designed for full RPG/VN scope.

entries.name: Resurrect 64
entries.creator: Kerrie Lake
entries.description: Carefully tuned 64-color painter's palette. Excellent for full-color illustration in pixel art.

entries.name: AAP-64
entries.creator: Adigun A. Polack
entries.description: Adigun Polack's 64-color general-purpose palette. Lush warm bias, full skin/foliage/sky ramps.

entries.name: AAP-Splendor128
entries.creator: Adigun A. Polack
entries.description: 128-color extension of AAP-64. Photo-grade pixel art without going full-RGB.

entries.name: Aurora
entries.creator: GrafxKid
entries.description: 256-color GrafX2 toolbox palette. Closest to a full-RGB index while staying constrained.

entries.name: Famicube
entries.creator: Arne Niklas Jansson
entries.description: Imagined 'what if the Famicom had 64 colors' palette by Arne. Excellent ramps with strong primaries.

entries.name: DawnBringer 16
entries.creator: DawnBringer
entries.description: Classic 16-color 'good for any game' palette with strong dark fantasy potential. Used in countless 16-color projects.

entries.name: DawnBringer 32 (DB32)
entries.creator: DawnBringer
entries.description: Extended DB16 with 32 colors. The classic 'all-purpose moody fantasy' palette - widely used in dungeon crawlers.

entries.name: Steam Lords
entries.creator: Slynyrd
entries.description: Slynyrd's signature dim, slate-and-rust palette. Bloodborne-adjacent moodiness in 16 colors. Top pick for Project VN.

entries.name: Lost Century
entries.creator: Pixanna
entries.description: Inspired by the Bestiarium of Aloys Zoetl. Sepia/parchment dark fantasy mood - perfect Project VN parchemin grimoire fit.

entries.name: NA16
entries.creator: Nauris
entries.description: Nauris's painterly 16-color palette. Great moody scenes with skin/wood/stone ramps that read well at 16 colors.

entries.name: Vinik24
entries.creator: Vinik
entries.description: Soft pastel take on the standard NES-ish 24-color set. Gentle, fairy-tale mood.

entries.name: Blessing
entries.creator: Vinik
entries.description: Tiny 5-color sepia palette. Perfect for grimoire pages, parchment UI, or 1-bit-with-warmth experiments.

entries.name: Mulfok 32
entries.creator: Mulfok
entries.description: Soft pastel 32-color palette with strong personality. Bright but never harsh.

entries.name: Journey
entries.creator: PineTreePizza
entries.description: 64-color RPG-targeted palette with full skin/metal/foliage ramps and warm dawn tones.

entries.name: PEAR36
entries.creator: PineappleOnPizza
entries.description: Modern 36-color all-rounder. Sister palette to Journey with stronger contrast.

entries.name: Fantasy 24
entries.creator: Gabriel C
entries.description: Earthy 24-color fantasy-RPG palette with parchment/wood/stone bias. Dark fantasy adjacent.

entries.name: Zughy 32
entries.creator: Zughy
entries.description: Modern 32-color storytelling palette. From the Piggy's Story project.

entries.name: Lospec 500
entries.creator: Lospec Discord (collaborative)
entries.description: Community-curated 42-color palette from Lospec Discord. Designed as a benchmark for general use.

entries.name: Borkfest
entries.creator: Hidden Asbestos
entries.description: Warm 8-color palette - autumnal, rustic, woodsy.

entries.name: NYX8
entries.creator: Javier Guerrero
entries.description: Cool dark 8-color palette. Moonlit dungeon vibes, top pick for limited dark-fantasy work.

entries.name: SLSO8
entries.creator: Luis Miguel Maldonado
entries.description: Warm sunset 8-color palette. Sandy desert / dawn vibes.

entries.name: Oil 6
entries.creator: GrafxKid
entries.description: 6-color palette mimicking oil paint. Constrained, painterly, warm bias.

entries.name: Fairydust 8
entries.creator: Yousurname
entries.description: Pastel 8-color palette covering full hue range. Soft fairy-tale mood.

entries.name: Pollen 8
entries.creator: Conker
entries.description: Sunny 8-color palette. Cherry blossom / spring meadow vibes.

entries.name: FunkyFuture 8
entries.creator: Shamaboy
entries.description: Neon 8-color cyberpunk palette. Synthwave, vaporwave.

entries.name: SpaceHaze
entries.creator: WildLeoKnight
entries.description: GameBoy-style 4-color cool palette - space, void, deep ocean.

entries.name: Twilight 5
entries.creator: Star
entries.description: 5-color twilight sunset palette. Dusk, twilight, cool sky.

entries.name: AYY4
entries.creator: Polyducks
entries.description: 4-color palette rivaling the GameBoy DMG. Smooth orange-to-cream ramp.

entries.name: 1bit Monitor Glow
entries.creator: Polyducks
entries.description: 2-color CRT phosphor green palette. 1-bit experimentation, terminal aesthetic.

entries.name: Mist GB
entries.creator: Kerrie Lake
entries.description: 4-color foggy GameBoy palette. Misty, mysterious, dark fantasy adjacent.

entries.name: Moonlight GB
entries.creator: WildLeoKnight
entries.description: 4-color cold-blue GameBoy palette. Moonlit dungeon, witching hour.

entries.name: Kirokaze GameBoy
entries.creator: Kirokaze
entries.description: 4-color cool GameBoy palette. Slightly more contrast than standard DMG, very popular for indie GB games.

entries.name: Ice Cream GB
entries.creator: Kerrie Lake
entries.description: Pink-cream 4-color GameBoy palette. Soft, sweet, fairy-tale.

entries.name: Rustic GB
entries.creator: Kerrie Lake
entries.description: Warm sepia 4-color GameBoy palette. Rustic, autumnal, parchment.

entries.name: Mushroom
entries.creator: Andrew Kensler
entries.description: Earthy mushroom-foraging palette. Mossy greens, mushroom browns, deep forest.

entries.name: Bubblegum 16
entries.creator: Rosalie
entries.description: Bright cheerful 16-color candy palette. Saturated playful mood.

entries.name: Arne 16
entries.creator: Arne Niklas Jansson
entries.description: Arne's classic 16-color palette - one of the most-cited limited palettes for pixel art instruction.

entries.name: Nintendo Entertainment System (NES)
entries.creator: Nintendo
entries.description: Full hardware palette of the NES. Note: only 4 colors per sprite tile in actual hardware constraints.

entries.name: Commodore 64
entries.creator: Commodore
entries.description: 16-color hardware palette of the C64. Distinctive muted purples and grays.
